channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter fly tipped bags, 26th May
item.description:
Just awful what a mess.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yarnton Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Silver pen tag on black plastic Council litter bin at the corner of Newlands Park (Newlands Parade) and Venner Rd., 26th May
item.description:
Silver pen tag on black plastic Council litter bin at the corner of Newlands Park (Newlands Parade) and Venner Rd.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa and at least 2 single mattresses flytipped by recycling unit fronting 226, Venner Rd, Penge jct with Newlands Park., 26th May
item.description:
Sofa and at least 2 single mattresses flytipped by recycling unit fronting 226, Venner Rd, Penge jct with Newlands Park. There is a CCTV camera on a lamp column on the corner opposite, exactly facing this location.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Venner Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp 5: LED streetlamp on at 7pm in bright sunshine fronting 12 or 14 Linden Grove, Penge. (Seen fleetingly from train) Several streetlamps are on nearby too, 26th May
item.description:

item.description:
Corner of Windus and Belfast

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windus Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Lamp 4: LED streetlamp on at 7pm in bright sunshine fronting 1 Linden Grove nr jct Newlands Park, Penge. Several streetlamps are on nearby too, 26th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Linden Grove, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foot wide pot hole caused by poor road repairs and subsidence, 26th May
item.description:
This pot hole has been here for over 2 years. It has been cause by poor repairs to road after it was dug up to replace water mains. The road repairs have created a significant hump before the pot hole. Vehicles hitting the hump timpact the road after it. The heavy electric double decker busses seem to be making this worse.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westwood Lane, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp 3: LED streetlamp on at 7pm in bright sunshine in Newlands Park nr jct Venner Rd, Penge - fronting 5 Newlands Parade. Several streetlamps are on nearby too, 26th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen tree on pathways, 26th May
item.description:
There are 2 areas around stumps hill pond where some large branches have fallen off tree's and they are blocking the pathways. It's also quite dangerous.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Calverley Close, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 26th May
item.description:
The bin needs to be emptied on a suitable schedule

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albemarle Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown pathway from walwyn avenue to havelock recreational ground, 26th May
item.description:
Becoming inaccessible due to overgrown nettles

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walwyn Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches hitting people at eye level, 26th May
item.description:
This is the second time I have had to report this new planted tree why do you not cut the branches at a higher level if myself or somebody else walks into it or the wind whips the branches at face eye level this tree will cause serious injury

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of littering left on this corner!, 26th May
item.description:
Please clean it. Thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Birch tree is dead, 26th May
item.description:
Birch tree outside 52/54 Little Birches Sidcup has died and obvious to us it will be in danger of falling it as been dead at least a month
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Little Birches, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
